name: okno
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for working on the Okno Windows-native MCP runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local workflows for the Okno Windows-native MCP runtime
interface.longDescription: Use the Okno repo-local plugin to run smoke checks, inspect diagnostics artifacts, and work safely with the existing Okno MCP runtime without replacing the current config.toml setup.
defaultPrompt: Проверь текущий Okno runtime и собери smoke evidence
Разбери последний failure в Okno diagnostics artifacts
